title: ferray-numpy-interop: no DynArray interop — runtime-typed arrays can't be converted
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

All conversion traits require compile-time type knowledge: ToArrow works on Array1<T>, AsFerray requires T: NpElement. There's no way to convert a DynArray (runtime-typed) to Arrow/NumPy/Polars or vice versa. For data loading pipelines where the dtype is determined at runtime (reading .npy files, receiving Arrow from IPC), users must match on the DynArray variant and convert each typed arm individually. Add DynArray -> Arrow/Series and DynArray -> PyArrayDyn conversions that dispatch on the runtime dtype.
